features.name: random struct type with nested array member
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef with rand members where one member is an array of integers

features.name: rand array of struct type
features.description: Code should include a rand variable that is an array of a struct type

features.name: nested foreach constraint on array inside struct array
features.description: Code should include a constraint using nested foreach loops to access an array member within a struct that is part of a struct array

features.name: foreach constraint on struct array member with inside operator
features.description: Code should include a constraint using foreach to access a struct member in an array and constrain it with inside operator
